economic_notes: Nation has significant investment in Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership (accounted for at cost). Business enterprises include NCN Thompson Bus Lines Limited Partnership, NCN Thompson Bus Ltd., NAC NCN Limited Partnership, NAC NCN GP Ltd. Capital construction in progress of $80,713,799. Investments in partnerships of $188,142,442.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Auditor report signed May 8, 2024. Prior year (2021) figures were restated due to prior period adjustment per Note 27 ($741,570). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $79,342,044 + Manitoba Hydro $2,654,232 + Province of Manitoba $2,403,143 + First Peoples Development Inc. $1,098,872 + CMHC $871,268 + Northern Regional Health Authority $855,345 = $87,224,904; osr adjusted accordingly. Large number of consolidated subsidiaries (37+). Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Investment in Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership at cost ($188,142,442). Capital construction in progress $80,713,799 represents significant ongoing capital program. Deferred expenditures of $4,745,138 relate to interest on loans repayable from Wuskwatim profits.
